tagline: Same delicious local flavours, no compromises

typography.heading: Bold serif, warm and elegant — black on pink/cream

visual.photography: Real food photography — top-view bento box shots in white containers, vibrant natural ingredients, comparison layouts (This vs That)
visual.lighting_default: Clean natural daylight, slightly warm, no heavy shadows — food looks fresh and appetizing
visual.style: Warm, feminine, clean — salmon pink and cream backgrounds with organic blob shapes, split-comparison layouts, calorie badges, nutritionist-approved badges
visual.logo_placement: Top-right corner, black serif MIRRA logotype
layout_patterns: Split comparison: regular food vs MIRRA (left/right, calorie callout)
Single hero bento: top-view shot with pink background, calorie + macro badge
Carousel: weekly menu preview, each slide = 1 bento
Lifestyle: woman with bento box, warm tones, relatable
avoid: Studio/ring light photography (use natural window light)
AI-generated food (use real product photos via Pipeline B)
Post-compositing food after generation (food must be INPUT)

voice.tone: Warm, relatable, confident — like a friend who eats well
voice.language_mix: English 60% + Bahasa Malaysia 40%, casual-warm with local food slang

audience.primary: Women 25-45, KL urban professionals, health-conscious but love good food
personas: Working woman who wants healthy lunch without cooking
Mom who wants nutritious meals for the family
Young professional tired of unhealthy mamak/fast food lunches
audience.market: Malaysia (KL: Taman Desa, Mont Kiara, Mitraditia, KLCC)
audience.delivery_areas: Taman Desa, Mont Kiara, Mitraditia, KLCC

products: Malaysian fusion bentos (nasi lemak, fried rice, laksa, rendang — made healthy)

RECIPE_REBELS.description: Hero bento shots, macro callouts, menu reveals — the food is the star
RECIPE_REBELS.format: Single hero or comparison, calorie badge

BEYOND_THE_FOOD.description: Self-care, wellness mindset, lifestyle beyond calories
BEYOND_THE_FOOD.format: Lifestyle imagery, warm illustration style, quote-forward

WOMEN_WHO_GET_IT.description: KOL content, testimonials, real women real stories

MIRRA_MAGIC.description: Behind-the-scenes, ingredient sourcing, chef process, brand story
MIRRA_MAGIC.format: BTS photos, process shots, team content

motion_language.name: Fresh & Warm
motion_language.vibe: Wholesome meal moment — feel-good, not guilt-trip
motion_language.audio: Gentle utensil sounds, fresh ingredients being placed, warm ambient music
motion_language.motion: Top-view bento reveal, side-by-side calorie comparison animation, steam rising from fresh bento, hands opening meal box
motion_language.language: Feel-good food content — aspirational but attainable, warm not cold

tiktok.camera_movement: Top-down bento reveal, side-by-side comparison swipe, unboxing POV
tiktok.typical_use: This vs That calorie comparison, bento unboxing, weekly menu reveal, KOL reviews

instagram.stories: Poll stickers (which bento?), calorie quiz, behind-the-scenes kitchen
instagram.feed: 1:1 or 4:5, hero bento shots, comparison posts, testimonial cards
instagram.reels: 9:16, bento reveal, KOL content, recipe process

whatsapp.format: Weekly menu PDF, bento of the day image, order confirmation
whatsapp.typical_use: Direct ordering, menu sharing, customer support

system_docs.note: Yvonne (Yi-Vonne) built these — the definitive Mirra content production system. All agents MUST read these before producing Mirra content.

generation_pipeline.pipeline_a: Text/surface swap only (no food photo) — NANO or FLUX
generation_pipeline.pipeline_b: Food photo as INPUT to generation — treat + NANO multi-image
generation_pipeline.pipeline_c: Food IS the background — treat as full-bleed bg + NANO overlay
generation_pipeline.post_processing: fit_45 → mirra_filter → stamp_logo → add_grain (ALWAYS this order)
generation_pipeline.audit: 8-dimension vision audit (watermark, palette, logo, text, crop, layout, food_real, brand_voice)

hong_jue_tang.note: Traditional Chinese medicine approach to weight management
